reasoning: CCI stock experienced a significant drop following its Q4 earnings (falling to $77.40 on February 5) but immediately rebounded with a massive 15% 6-day rally, closing at $89.26 on February 13. Consequently, for the February 22 resolution, the probability is estimated below 0.50 (at 0.42) due to expected consolidation or mean reversion from a local top.
